mapper.insert: insert into special_alert_setting (user_id, alert_name, trigger_state, target_source, key_word, params, frequency, alert_trigger, time_range, alert_method, dedup_enable, state, create_time, alert_level) values (#{userId}, #{alertName}, 0, #{targetSource}, #{keyWord}, #{params}, #{frequency}, #{alertTrigger}, #{timeRange}, #{alertMethod}, #{dedupEnable}, 0, now(), #{alertLevel})
